title: Allogene Therapeutics Reports Positive Phase 1 Data from the ALPHA Trials in Non-Hodgkin's Lymphoma at the 63rd Annual Meeting of the American Society of Hematology
text: Allogene reported positive Phase 1 data from the ALPHA trials at the American Society of Hematology (ASH) Annual Meeting in December 2021. The data demonstrated compelling clinical efficacy and favorable safety profile of ALLO-501 in relapsed/refractory NHL. Updated results from the ALPHA2 trial with ALLO-501A showed comparable performance to the original ALLO-501 product. These landmark presentations established Allogene's leadership in allogeneic CAR T development and supported advancement to Phase 2 studies.
